name: sdlc-plugin
description: Software Development Lifecycle skills, bundled. Five skills designed to be used in sequence as you take a project from idea to backlog: /repo-bootstrap (new GitHub repo from scratch), /repo-level-up (add release/uat + release/prod branches, promotion workflows, secret scanning, branch-protection rulesets), /repo-requirements (interactively elicit functional + non-functional requirements into docs/requirements/), /confirm-requirements (validate and advance the status of existing requirements), /plan-from-requirements (turn the requirements into a staged plan of small-batch GitHub issues with milestones, labels, and human-required tasks front-loaded).
